errors.title: Errors ({{count}})
errors.orphansDesc: Account references a parent that doesn't exist in the chart.
errors.orphansFix: Drag to a valid parent or create the parent account.
errors.duplicateCodesDesc: Two or more accounts with the same code.
errors.duplicateCodesFix: Edit one of the codes to make it unique.
errors.cyclesDesc: Circular hierarchy: A parent of B which is parent of A.
errors.cyclesFix: Fix the parent field of one of the accounts.
errors.postingWithChildrenDesc: Posting account cannot have sub-accounts in NetSuite.
errors.postingWithChildrenFix: Convert to summary (wrench button) or move the children.

warnings.title: Warnings ({{count}})
warnings.duplicateNamesDesc: Siblings with identical name under the same parent.
warnings.typeSuspiciousDesc: Type does not match Brazilian prefix.
warnings.levelCodeMismatchDesc: Tree depth differs from code segments.
warnings.levelCodeMismatchFix: Adjust hierarchy or reformat the code.
warnings.codeFormatFix: Use Normalize in the toolbar or edit manually.
warnings.immutableChangedDesc: Code/type of existing accounts are immutable.
warnings.immutableChangedFix: Revert or delete and recreate the account.
warnings.tooManyRootsDesc: More than 10 roots (unusual in Brazilian chart).

val.orphan: Orphan account — assign to a parent
val.typeSuspicious: Code "{{code}}" belongs to group {{prefix}} ({{group}}), but type "{{type}}" is not expected. Expected types: {{expected}}
val.levelMismatch: Code "{{code}}" has {{segments}} segments (expected level: {{expected}}), but is at level {{actual}} in tree
val.codeFormat: Code format does not follow pattern (e.g. 1.01.02)
val.immutableChanged: Code and Type cannot be changed on existing accounts
